products.name: Musician and YouTuber Hainbach on ‘Breath of the Wild’ and Swiss Army Knives
products.summary: Stefan Paul Goetsch, better known as Hainbach, is a German experimental composer, artist, and YouTuber who is perhaps most famous for making music with laboratory equipment and scientific instruments. He describes it as being like the "Dark Souls of synthesis.
